name: simulations-mcp-server
description: Simulations MCP Server - TypeScript with Python COM Backend
author: Duke Systems AB

scripts.copy-files: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('src/simulation_backend.py', 'dist/simulation_backend.py'); fs.copyFileSync('src/dialog_watcher.py', 'dist/dialog_watcher.py'); fs.copyFileSync('src/dialog_table.py', 'dist/dialog_table.py'); fs.copyFileSync('src/attribute_config.py', 'dist/attribute_config.py'); fs.copyFileSync('src/resource_pool_config.py', 'dist/resource_pool_config.py'); fs.copyFileSync('src/attribute_detect.py', 'dist/attribute_detect.py'); fs.copyFileSync('src/psg_extract.py', 'dist/psg_extract.py'); fs.copyFileSync('src/patterns.py', 'dist/patterns.py'); fs.copyFileSync('src/instantiate.py', 'dist/instantiate.py'); fs.copyFileSync('src/compose.py', 'dist/compose.py'); fs.copyFileSync('src/molecule_schema.py', 'dist/molecule_schema.py'); fs.copyFileSync('src/block_reference.json', 'dist/block_reference.json'); fs.copyFileSync('src/templates.json', 'dist/templates.json'); fs.copyFileSync('src/modl_reference.json', 'dist/modl_reference.json'); fs.copyFileSync('src/dialog_reference.json', 'dist/dialog_reference.json'); fs.copyFileSync('src/simulation_type_guide.json', 'dist/simulation_type_guide.json'); fs.copyFileSync('src/modeling_guides.json', 'dist/modeling_guides.json'); fs.copyFileSync('src/pattern_library.json', 'dist/pattern_library.json');"
